GET /twitter/tweets.heading_zh: 按 ID 批量获取推文 GET /twitter/tweets
GET /twitter/tweets.desc_en: Look up the full content of multiple tweets in one call by passing their tweet IDs.
GET /twitter/tweets.description_zh: 一次请求传入多个推文 ID，批量查询这些推文的完整内容。

GET /twitter/tweet/replies.desc_en: List the replies to a given tweet, paginated with the cursor.
GET /twitter/tweet/replies.description_zh: 获取某条推文下的回复，并通过游标翻页。

GET /twitter/tweet/quotes.desc_en: List the quote tweets that reference a given tweet, paginated with the cursor.
GET /twitter/tweet/quotes.description_zh: 获取引用了某条推文的引用推文，并通过游标翻页。

GET /twitter/tweet/retweeters.desc_en: List the users who retweeted a given tweet, paginated with the cursor.
GET /twitter/tweet/retweeters.description_zh: 获取转发了某条推文的用户，并通过游标翻页。

tweet_ids.desc_en: Comma-separated list of tweet IDs to look up in this batch.
tweet_ids.title_zh: 本次批量查询的推文 ID 列表，以逗号分隔。

tweets.desc_en: The requested tweets, one entry per matched ID.
tweets.title_zh: 所查询的推文，每个匹配到的 ID 对应一条。

tweets.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.
tweets.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为推文。

tweets.url.desc_en: Web link to the tweet on X/Twitter.
tweets.url.title_zh: 推文在 X/Twitter 上的网页链接。

tweets.text.desc_en: Full text content of the tweet.

tweets.source.desc_en: Name of the client application used to post the tweet.
tweets.source.title_zh: 发布该推文所用的客户端应用名称。

tweets.retweetCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted.

tweets.replyCount.desc_en: Number of replies to the tweet.

tweets.likeCount.desc_en: Number of likes on the tweet.

tweets.quoteCount.desc_en: Number of quote tweets referencing this tweet.
tweets.quoteCount.title_zh: 引用该推文的引用推文数。

tweets.viewCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been viewed.

tweets.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the tweet was created.

tweets.lang.desc_en: Detected language of the tweet text, as a language code.
tweets.lang.title_zh: 推文正文被识别出的语言，以语言代码表示。

tweets.bookmarkCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been bookmarked.

tweets.isReply.desc_en: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.
tweets.isReply.title_zh: 该推文是否为对另一条推文的回复。

tweets.inReplyToId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet this one directly replies to; present only when isReply is true.
tweets.inReplyToId.title_zh: 该推文直接回复的目标推文标识；仅当 isReply 为真时存在。

tweets.conversationId.desc_en: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.
tweets.conversationId.title_zh: 该推文所属对话线程的起始推文标识。

tweets.displayTextRange.desc_en: Start and end character offsets marking the displayable portion of the tweet text.
tweets.displayTextRange.title_zh: 标记推文正文中可显示部分的起止字符位置。

tweets.inReplyToUserId.desc_en: Identifier of the user being replied to.

tweets.inReplyToUsername.desc_en: Username of the user being replied to.

tweets.author.desc_en: Profile of the user who posted the tweet.
tweets.author.title_zh: 发布该推文的用户资料。

tweets.author.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
tweets.author.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

tweets.author.userName.desc_en: The author's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
tweets.author.userName.title_zh: 作者的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

tweets.author.url.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile page.
tweets.author.url.title_zh: 作者资料页的网页链接。

tweets.author.name.desc_en: The author's display name shown on the profile.
tweets.author.name.title_zh: 作者在资料页展示的昵称。

tweets.author.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the author holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
tweets.author.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 作者是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

tweets.author.verifiedType.desc_en: The author's verification category, such as a business or government account.
tweets.author.verifiedType.title_zh: 作者的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

tweets.author.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's avatar image.
tweets.author.profilePicture.title_zh: 作者头像图片的网页链接。

tweets.author.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile banner image.
tweets.author.coverPicture.title_zh: 作者资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

tweets.author.description.title_zh: 作者资料页的个人简介文字。

tweets.author.location.desc_en: Free-text location the author lists on their profile.
tweets.author.location.title_zh: 作者在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

tweets.author.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the author.

tweets.author.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the author follows.

tweets.author.canDm.desc_en: Whether the author currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
tweets.author.canDm.title_zh: 作者当前是否接受请求方的私信。

tweets.author.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the author's account was created.

tweets.author.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the author has liked.

tweets.author.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the author has created custom timelines.
tweets.author.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 作者是否创建过自定义时间线。

tweets.author.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the author participates in the Twitter translation program.
tweets.author.isTranslator.title_zh: 作者是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

tweets.author.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the author has posted.
tweets.author.mediaCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的媒体条目数。

tweets.author.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the author has posted.
tweets.author.statusesCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的推文总数。

tweets.author.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the author's account is withheld for legal reasons.
tweets.author.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽作者账号的国家／地区代码列表。

tweets.author.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the author's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
tweets.author.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 作者的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

tweets.author.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the author has pinned to the top of their profile.
tweets.author.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 作者置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

tweets.author.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
tweets.author.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

tweets.author.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
tweets.author.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

tweets.author.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the author's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
tweets.author.unavailable.title_zh: 作者账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

tweets.author.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
tweets.author.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

tweets.author.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
tweets.author.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

tweets.entities.desc_en: Structured entities parsed from the tweet text, such as hashtags, links, and user mentions.
tweets.entities.title_zh: 从推文正文解析出的结构化实体，如话题标签、链接与用户提及。

tweets.entities.hashtags.desc_en: Hashtags found in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.hashtags.title_zh: 推文正文中出现的话题标签。

tweets.entities.hashtags.indices.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the hashtag within the tweet text.
tweets.entities.hashtags.indices.title_zh: 该话题标签在推文正文中的起止字符位置。

tweets.entities.hashtags.text.desc_en: The hashtag word, without the leading # sign.
tweets.entities.hashtags.text.title_zh: 话题标签的文字，不含开头的 # 号。

tweets.entities.urls.desc_en: Links found in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.title_zh: 推文正文中出现的链接。

tweets.entities.urls.display_url.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the tweet.
tweets.entities.urls.display_url.title_zh: 推文中显示的链接的短化、易读形式。

tweets.entities.urls.expanded_url.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.
tweets.entities.urls.expanded_url.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

tweets.entities.urls.indices.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.indices.title_zh: 该链接在推文正文中的起止字符位置。

tweets.entities.urls.url.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.url.title_zh: 推文正文中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

tweets.entities.user_mentions.desc_en: Users mentioned in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.user_mentions.title_zh: 推文正文中提及的用户。

tweets.entities.user_mentions.name.desc_en: Display name of the mentioned user.

tweets.entities.user_mentions.screen_nam.title_zh: 被提及用户的 @ 用户名。

tweets.quoted_tweet.desc_en: The tweet quoted by this tweet, when it is a quote tweet.
tweets.quoted_tweet.title_zh: 当该推文为引用推文时，其所引用的推文。
tweets.quoted_tweet.annotation: 源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。

tweets.retweeted_tweet.desc_en: The original tweet this tweet retweets, when it is a retweet.
tweets.retweeted_tweet.title_zh: 当该推文为转发时，其所转发的原推文。
tweets.retweeted_tweet.annotation: 源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。

tweets.isLimitedReply.desc_en: Whether replies to this tweet are restricted by the author's reply settings.
tweets.isLimitedReply.title_zh: 该推文的回复是否受作者的回复权限设置限制。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request, such as success or error.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记，如成功或失败。

message.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail on failure.
message.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；失败时承载错误详情。

tweetId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet whose replies you want.
tweetId.title_zh: 要获取其回复的推文标识。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

replies.desc_en: Reply tweets to the target tweet, returned for this page.
replies.title_zh: 本页返回的针对目标推文的回复推文。

replies.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.
replies.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为推文。

replies.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the reply tweet.

replies.url.desc_en: Web link to the reply tweet on X/Twitter.
replies.url.title_zh: 回复推文在 X/Twitter 上的网页链接。

replies.text.desc_en: Full text content of the reply tweet.
replies.text.title_zh: 回复推文的完整正文内容。

replies.source.desc_en: Name of the client application used to post the reply.
replies.source.title_zh: 发布该回复所用的客户端应用名称。

replies.retweetCount.desc_en: Number of times the reply has been retweeted.

replies.replyCount.desc_en: Number of replies to the reply.

replies.likeCount.desc_en: Number of likes on the reply.

replies.quoteCount.desc_en: Number of quote tweets referencing this reply.
replies.quoteCount.title_zh: 引用该回复的引用推文数。

replies.viewCount.desc_en: Number of times the reply has been viewed.

replies.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the reply was created.

replies.lang.desc_en: Detected language of the reply text, as a language code.
replies.lang.title_zh: 回复正文被识别出的语言，以语言代码表示。

replies.bookmarkCount.desc_en: Number of times the reply has been bookmarked.

replies.isReply.desc_en: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.
replies.isReply.title_zh: 该推文是否为对另一条推文的回复。

replies.inReplyToId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet this reply directly answers.
replies.inReplyToId.title_zh: 该回复直接答复的目标推文标识。

replies.conversationId.desc_en: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread.
replies.conversationId.title_zh: 对话线程起始推文的标识。

replies.displayTextRange.desc_en: Start and end character offsets marking the displayable portion of the reply text.
replies.displayTextRange.title_zh: 标记回复正文中可显示部分的起止字符位置。

replies.inReplyToUserId.desc_en: Identifier of the user being replied to.

replies.inReplyToUsername.desc_en: Username of the user being replied to.

replies.author.desc_en: Profile of the user who posted the reply.
replies.author.title_zh: 发布该回复的用户资料。

replies.author.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
replies.author.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

replies.author.userName.desc_en: The author's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
replies.author.userName.title_zh: 作者的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

replies.author.url.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile page.
replies.author.url.title_zh: 作者资料页的网页链接。

replies.author.name.desc_en: The author's display name shown on the profile.
replies.author.name.title_zh: 作者在资料页展示的昵称。

replies.author.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the author holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
replies.author.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 作者是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

replies.author.verifiedType.desc_en: The author's verification category, such as a business or government account.
replies.author.verifiedType.title_zh: 作者的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

replies.author.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's avatar image.
replies.author.profilePicture.title_zh: 作者头像图片的网页链接。

replies.author.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile banner image.
replies.author.coverPicture.title_zh: 作者资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

replies.author.description.title_zh: 作者资料页的个人简介文字。

replies.author.location.desc_en: Free-text location the author lists on their profile.
replies.author.location.title_zh: 作者在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

replies.author.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the author.

replies.author.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the author follows.

replies.author.canDm.desc_en: Whether the author currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
replies.author.canDm.title_zh: 作者当前是否接受请求方的私信。

replies.author.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the author's account was created.

replies.author.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the author has liked.

replies.author.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the author has created custom timelines.
replies.author.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 作者是否创建过自定义时间线。

replies.author.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the author participates in the Twitter translation program.
replies.author.isTranslator.title_zh: 作者是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

replies.author.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the author has posted.
replies.author.mediaCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的媒体条目数。

replies.author.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the author has posted.
replies.author.statusesCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的推文总数。

replies.author.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the author's account is withheld for legal reasons.
replies.author.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽作者账号的国家／地区代码列表。

replies.author.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the author's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
replies.author.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 作者的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

replies.author.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the author has pinned to the top of their profile.
replies.author.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 作者置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

replies.author.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
replies.author.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

replies.author.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
replies.author.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

replies.author.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the author's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
replies.author.unavailable.title_zh: 作者账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

replies.author.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
replies.author.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

replies.author.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
replies.author.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

replies.entities.desc_en: Structured entities parsed from the reply text, such as hashtags, links, and user mentions.
replies.entities.title_zh: 从回复正文解析出的结构化实体，如话题标签、链接与用户提及。

replies.entities.hashtags.desc_en: Hashtags found in the reply text.
replies.entities.hashtags.title_zh: 回复正文中出现的话题标签。

replies.entities.hashtags.indices.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the hashtag within the reply text.
replies.entities.hashtags.indices.title_zh: 该话题标签在回复正文中的起止字符位置。

replies.entities.hashtags.text.desc_en: The hashtag word, without the leading # sign.
replies.entities.hashtags.text.title_zh: 话题标签的文字，不含开头的 # 号。

replies.entities.urls.desc_en: Links found in the reply text.
replies.entities.urls.title_zh: 回复正文中出现的链接。

replies.entities.urls.display_url.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the reply.
replies.entities.urls.display_url.title_zh: 回复中显示的链接的短化、易读形式。

replies.entities.urls.expanded_url.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.
replies.entities.urls.expanded_url.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

replies.entities.urls.indices.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the reply text.
replies.entities.urls.indices.title_zh: 该链接在回复正文中的起止字符位置。

replies.entities.urls.url.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the reply text.
replies.entities.urls.url.title_zh: 回复正文中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

replies.entities.user_mentions.desc_en: Users mentioned in the reply text.
replies.entities.user_mentions.title_zh: 回复正文中提及的用户。

replies.entities.user_mentions.name.desc_en: Display name of the mentioned user.

replies.entities.user_mentions.screen_na.title_zh: 被提及用户的 @ 用户名。

replies.quoted_tweet.desc_en: The tweet quoted by this reply, when it is a quote tweet.
replies.quoted_tweet.title_zh: 当该回复为引用推文时，其所引用的推文。
replies.quoted_tweet.annotation: 源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。

replies.retweeted_tweet.desc_en: The original tweet this reply retweets, when it is a retweet.
replies.retweeted_tweet.title_zh: 当该回复为转发时，其所转发的原推文。
replies.retweeted_tweet.annotation: 源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。

replies.isLimitedReply.desc_en: Whether replies to this reply are restricted by the author's reply settings.
replies.isLimitedReply.title_zh: 该回复的回复是否受作者的回复权限设置限制。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request, such as success or error.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记，如成功或失败。

message.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail on failure.
message.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；失败时承载错误详情。

tweetId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet whose quote tweets you want.
tweetId.title_zh: 要获取其引用推文的推文标识。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

tweets.desc_en: Quote tweets referencing the target tweet, returned for this page.
tweets.title_zh: 本页返回的引用了目标推文的引用推文。

tweets.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.
tweets.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为推文。

tweets.url.desc_en: Web link to the tweet on X/Twitter.
tweets.url.title_zh: 推文在 X/Twitter 上的网页链接。

tweets.text.desc_en: Full text content of the tweet.

tweets.source.desc_en: Name of the client application used to post the tweet.
tweets.source.title_zh: 发布该推文所用的客户端应用名称。

tweets.retweetCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted.

tweets.replyCount.desc_en: Number of replies to the tweet.

tweets.likeCount.desc_en: Number of likes on the tweet.

tweets.quoteCount.desc_en: Number of quote tweets referencing this tweet.
tweets.quoteCount.title_zh: 引用该推文的引用推文数。

tweets.viewCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been viewed.

tweets.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the tweet was created.

tweets.lang.desc_en: Detected language of the tweet text, as a language code.
tweets.lang.title_zh: 推文正文被识别出的语言，以语言代码表示。

tweets.bookmarkCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been bookmarked.

tweets.isReply.desc_en: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.
tweets.isReply.title_zh: 该推文是否为对另一条推文的回复。

tweets.inReplyToId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet this one directly replies to; present only when isReply is true.
tweets.inReplyToId.title_zh: 该推文直接回复的目标推文标识；仅当 isReply 为真时存在。

tweets.conversationId.desc_en: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.
tweets.conversationId.title_zh: 该推文所属对话线程的起始推文标识。

tweets.displayTextRange.desc_en: Start and end character offsets marking the displayable portion of the tweet text.
tweets.displayTextRange.title_zh: 标记推文正文中可显示部分的起止字符位置。

tweets.inReplyToUserId.desc_en: Identifier of the user being replied to.

tweets.inReplyToUsername.desc_en: Username of the user being replied to.

tweets.author.desc_en: Profile of the user who posted the tweet.
tweets.author.title_zh: 发布该推文的用户资料。

tweets.author.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
tweets.author.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

tweets.author.userName.desc_en: The author's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
tweets.author.userName.title_zh: 作者的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

tweets.author.url.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile page.
tweets.author.url.title_zh: 作者资料页的网页链接。

tweets.author.name.desc_en: The author's display name shown on the profile.
tweets.author.name.title_zh: 作者在资料页展示的昵称。

tweets.author.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the author holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
tweets.author.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 作者是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

tweets.author.verifiedType.desc_en: The author's verification category, such as a business or government account.
tweets.author.verifiedType.title_zh: 作者的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

tweets.author.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's avatar image.
tweets.author.profilePicture.title_zh: 作者头像图片的网页链接。

tweets.author.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the author's profile banner image.
tweets.author.coverPicture.title_zh: 作者资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

tweets.author.description.title_zh: 作者资料页的个人简介文字。

tweets.author.location.desc_en: Free-text location the author lists on their profile.
tweets.author.location.title_zh: 作者在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

tweets.author.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the author.

tweets.author.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the author follows.

tweets.author.canDm.desc_en: Whether the author currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
tweets.author.canDm.title_zh: 作者当前是否接受请求方的私信。

tweets.author.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the author's account was created.

tweets.author.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the author has liked.

tweets.author.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the author has created custom timelines.
tweets.author.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 作者是否创建过自定义时间线。

tweets.author.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the author participates in the Twitter translation program.
tweets.author.isTranslator.title_zh: 作者是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

tweets.author.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the author has posted.
tweets.author.mediaCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的媒体条目数。

tweets.author.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the author has posted.
tweets.author.statusesCount.title_zh: 作者发布过的推文总数。

tweets.author.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the author's account is withheld for legal reasons.
tweets.author.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽作者账号的国家／地区代码列表。

tweets.author.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the author's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
tweets.author.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 作者的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

tweets.author.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the author has pinned to the top of their profile.
tweets.author.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 作者置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

tweets.author.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
tweets.author.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

tweets.author.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
tweets.author.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

tweets.author.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the author's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
tweets.author.unavailable.title_zh: 作者账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

tweets.author.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
tweets.author.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

tweets.author.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
tweets.author.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

tweets.entities.desc_en: Structured entities parsed from the tweet text, such as hashtags, links, and user mentions.
tweets.entities.title_zh: 从推文正文解析出的结构化实体，如话题标签、链接与用户提及。

tweets.entities.hashtags.desc_en: Hashtags found in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.hashtags.title_zh: 推文正文中出现的话题标签。

tweets.entities.hashtags.indices.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the hashtag within the tweet text.
tweets.entities.hashtags.indices.title_zh: 该话题标签在推文正文中的起止字符位置。

tweets.entities.hashtags.text.desc_en: The hashtag word, without the leading # sign.
tweets.entities.hashtags.text.title_zh: 话题标签的文字，不含开头的 # 号。

tweets.entities.urls.desc_en: Links found in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.title_zh: 推文正文中出现的链接。

tweets.entities.urls.display_url.desc_en: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the tweet.
tweets.entities.urls.display_url.title_zh: 推文中显示的链接的短化、易读形式。

tweets.entities.urls.expanded_url.desc_en: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.
tweets.entities.urls.expanded_url.title_zh: 显示链接最终指向的完整目标地址。

tweets.entities.urls.indices.desc_en: Start and end character offsets of the link within the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.indices.title_zh: 该链接在推文正文中的起止字符位置。

tweets.entities.urls.url.desc_en: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.urls.url.title_zh: 推文正文中实际出现的 t.co 短链接。

tweets.entities.user_mentions.desc_en: Users mentioned in the tweet text.
tweets.entities.user_mentions.title_zh: 推文正文中提及的用户。

tweets.entities.user_mentions.name.desc_en: Display name of the mentioned user.

tweets.entities.user_mentions.screen_nam.title_zh: 被提及用户的 @ 用户名。

tweets.quoted_tweet.desc_en: The tweet quoted by this tweet, when it is a quote tweet.
tweets.quoted_tweet.title_zh: 当该推文为引用推文时，其所引用的推文。
tweets.quoted_tweet.annotation: 源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。

tweets.retweeted_tweet.desc_en: The original tweet this tweet retweets, when it is a retweet.
tweets.retweeted_tweet.title_zh: 当该推文为转发时，其所转发的原推文。
tweets.retweeted_tweet.annotation: 源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。

tweets.isLimitedReply.desc_en: Whether replies to this tweet are restricted by the author's reply settings.
tweets.isLimitedReply.title_zh: 该推文的回复是否受作者的回复权限设置限制。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request, such as success or error.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记，如成功或失败。

message.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail on failure.
message.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；失败时承载错误详情。

tweetId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet whose retweeters you want.
tweetId.title_zh: 要获取其转发者的推文标识。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

users.desc_en: Users who retweeted the target tweet, returned for this page.
users.title_zh: 本页返回的转发了目标推文的用户。

users.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
users.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

users.userName.desc_en: The user's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
users.userName.title_zh: 用户的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

users.url.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile page.
users.url.title_zh: 用户资料页的网页链接。

users.name.desc_en: The user's display name shown on the profile.
users.name.title_zh: 用户在资料页展示的昵称。

users.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the user holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
users.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 用户是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

users.verifiedType.desc_en: The user's verification category, such as a business or government account.
users.verifiedType.title_zh: 用户的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

users.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's avatar image.
users.profilePicture.title_zh: 用户头像图片的网页链接。

users.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile banner image.
users.coverPicture.title_zh: 用户资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

users.description.title_zh: 用户资料页的个人简介文字。

users.location.desc_en: Free-text location the user lists on their profile.
users.location.title_zh: 用户在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

users.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the user.

users.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the user follows.

users.canDm.desc_en: Whether the user currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
users.canDm.title_zh: 该用户当前是否接受请求方的私信。

users.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the user's account was created.
users.createdAt.title_zh: 该用户账号的创建时间。

users.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the user has liked.
users.favouritesCount.title_zh: 该用户点赞过的推文数。

users.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the user has created custom timelines.
users.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 该用户是否创建过自定义时间线。

users.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the user participates in the Twitter translation program.
users.isTranslator.title_zh: 该用户是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

users.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the user has posted.
users.mediaCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的媒体条目数。

users.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the user has posted.
users.statusesCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的推文总数。

users.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the user's account is withheld for legal reasons.
users.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽该用户账号的国家／地区代码列表。

users.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the user's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
users.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 该用户的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

users.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the user has pinned to the top of their profile.
users.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 该用户置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

users.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
users.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

users.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
users.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

users.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the user's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
users.unavailable.title_zh: 该用户账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

users.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
users.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

users.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
users.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request, such as success or error.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记，如成功或失败。

message.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail on failure.
message.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；失败时承载错误详情。
